focus: whether the user's personal financial situation will improve within this month
cardReadingDirection: Yes — your finances are set to improve this month, but the gain arrives after a mid-month squeeze rather than as a smooth climb. Card 1 (Ace of Pentacles) = a fresh, concrete money opening appears early in the month — a new gig, a sale, an invoice, or an offer — and the user should say yes to the first tangible one rather than holding out for something bigger. Card 2 (Five of Pentacles) = expect a cash-flow pinch or unexpected expense around mid-month; the move is to name the shortfall immediately and ask for an extension, payment plan, or support instead of quietly draining reserves. Card 3 (Ten of Pentacles) = by month's end the money stabilizes into something durable — income tied to household, family, or long-standing clients pays off best, so route the new earnings there instead of one-off spending. Start today: list every incoming money opportunity you already have, commit to the newest concrete one, and set aside a small buffer now to cover the mid-month strain.
